title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Club Mahindra - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Club Mahindra - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Club Mahindra in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Club Mahindra:
Club Mahindra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Club Mahindra!
